hooks.command: cd /d/Projects/lottery-analyzer && if ! git diff --quiet HEAD -- CLAUDE_HISTORY.md 2>/dev/null; then git add CLAUDE_HISTORY.md && git commit -m "Update CLAUDE_HISTORY $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" && git push origin main 2>/dev/null && printf '{"systemMessage":"✓ CLAUDE_HISTORY.md push GitHub แล้ว"}'; else printf '{"systemMessage":"⚠ CLAUDE_HISTORY.md ยังไม่อัพเดต session นี้"}'; fi
hooks.statusMessage: กำลัง push CLAUDE_HISTORY ไป GitHub...
